AddressInfo.Title: West Way Nissan Stourbridge
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Check with dealer for access queries. Charger is located to the right of the entrance.

GeneralComments: Inside Nissan dealer. Only available when dealer open. Monday to Friday 8.30am - 7.00pm; Saturday 8.30am - 5.00pm; Sunday 10.00am - 4.00pm. You will NOT need an RFID card to access the CHAdeMO. However the charger is normally ICEd. Therefore you have to go to reception to get car moved. Add 5-15 min to charging time.
Unit is located in the customer car park.

AddressInfo.Title: Tesco Extra - Stourbridge
AddressInfo.AccessComments: 4 charge points immediately right at the bottom of the car park entry ramp and 4 more on the floor below in the corresponding place.

GeneralComments:
These spaces have now all been set with their active supply on, so no need to contact Customer Services to unlock them. There is also signage indicating that the spaces are for EV's only but these are frequently ignored by ICE's in all but the quietest periods of the day as they are so close to the entrance.

AddressInfo.Title: Abbey Stadium
AddressInfo.AccessComments: The chargepoint is situated in front of the leisure centre building. Follow the road around to the front of the building and you will see the chargepoint to the left of the building as you drive up, next to the green electricity sub-station. Access hours: 24 hours, 7 days a week Leisure Centre opening hours: The leisure centre is open from 6.45 - 22.30 Mon to Friday and from 8.00 - 20.00 Saturday and Sunday. Parking is free. Max stay in the charging bay 1 hour.

GeneralComments: Pay by Charge Your Car RFID card, or by using the APP (available through Google Play or Apple), or by phoning the number on the chargepoint and paying by credit or debit card. Chargepoint is also available on the Polar Plus network for Polar Plus members (electricity cost of £0.09/kWh ex VAT).
The unit is located on the far left of the car park - store entrance
